attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
MT.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,MT.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,MT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,MT.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,MT.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,MT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,MT.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,MT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,MT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,MT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,MT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,MT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,MT.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
,MT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,MT.SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,MT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,MT.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
,MT.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       
,MT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,MT.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
,MT.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,MT.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
,MT.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          
,MT.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
,MT.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
,MT.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,MT.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         
,MT.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,MT.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
,MT.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
,MT.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        
,MT.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,MT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
,'USER' AS EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,MT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           
,MT.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,MT.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    
,MT.GL_DT                         
,MT.BK_SS_CD                      
,MT.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               
,MT.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,MT.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
,MT.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
,MT.TRANSACTION_DT                
,MT.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
,MT.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,MT.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,MT.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG       
,MT.DV_RESTATED_OR_ACTUAL_FLG     
,MT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,MT.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,MT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,MT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,MT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,MT.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                
,MT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD           
,MT.DV_FMV_FLG                    
,MT.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,MT.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                     
,MT.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,MT.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY
,MT.POB_TYPE_CD                   
,MT.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG 
,PR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID     
,PR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE         
,PR.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID      
,'Cisco' AS SOURCE_ENTITY_NAME            
, 'Non Recurring' AS REVENUE_CLASSIFICATION        
, 'N' AS RECURRING_FLG  
,MT.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
,MT.SPLIT_PCT 
,'Indirect Revenue Adjustments' AS  DV_REV_CLASS_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY18 */
,MT.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY /* added as part of Revenue accruals Q2FY19  */
,MT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY /* added as part of Revenue accruals Q2FY19  */
,MT.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* Added as part of ICPM Q3FY20*/ 
,MT.NET_PRICE_FLG
,MT.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
,MT.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,MT.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_INV_REV_MEASURE MT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN PR
ON (PR.ITEM_KEY=MT.PRODUCT_KEY) 
WHERE /*DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y' */
MT.DV_SERVICE_FLG  =  'Y'  
AND MT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT IN  (SELECT PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_RR_MONTH_CNTL)/*(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG  ='Y')*/
AND MT.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD NOT IN   ( 'IND_ADJ')
